overview.Summary: This scenario outlines a basic cyber attack targeting Water and Wastewater Systems.

Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets Application Log OS Process Network Traffic File
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method Application Log Content (Mechanism) Code Injection Network Traffic Content (Mechanism) File Modification (Mechanism)

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker injects malicious code into internet-facing assets to gain initial access.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker collects remote email content using application log mechanisms.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: The attacker injects malicious code into operating system processes.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker disrupts network traffic to overload pumps and valves.

stage.name: Impact
stage.capec: CAPEC-675: Retrieve Data from Decommissioned Devices
stage.description: The attacker erases data on critical infrastructure systems.

Scenario.summary: This scenario demonstrates a basic cyber attack against Water and Wastewater Systems, leveraging code injection and denial-of-service techniques to disrupt operations.
